$schema_doc: Manifest of MCP servers and Python user-packages used across the team. Read by scripts/setup-extras.ps1 to install/register missing items on the local machine. Read by scripts/auto-pull.ps1 to notify user about pending diff between manifest and local state. WHEN ADDING A NEW MCP SERVER OR PACKAGE: edit this file, commit + push -- auto-sync will distribute it. Other PCs will see notification 'extras-diff: N pending' in auto-sync.log and the user can run setup-extras.ps1 to apply.

python_user_packages.name: ezdxf
python_user_packages.purpose: DXF generation and reading (AutoCAD interop without GUI)

python_user_packages.name: pypdfium2
python_user_packages.purpose: PDF rendering without 2000x2000 limit of pdf-mcp

python_user_packages.name: paddleocr
python_user_packages.purpose: OCR for scanned/raster PDFs (Russian + English, no Tesseract)

python_user_packages.name: Pillow
python_user_packages.purpose: Image render (text on scans) for skills/image-text-replace

python_user_packages.name: opencv-python
python_user_packages.purpose: Image mask ops + fast inpaint fallback for skills/image-text-replace

python_user_packages.name: iopaint
python_user_packages.purpose: LaMa inpaint engine (primary mode) for skills/image-text-replace. CLI: iopaint run --model=lama --image=<dir> --mask=<dir> --output=<dir>
python_user_packages.post_install_note: REQUIRED: download LaMa model (~196 MB) to ASCII-safe path before first use. Auto-download через iopaint часто рвётся на 50% (MD5 mismatch). Manual download: mkdir 'C:\iopaint-cache\torch\hub\checkpoints'; curl -L --retry 10 --retry-delay 5 --retry-all-errors -o 'C:\iopaint-cache\torch\hub\checkpoints\big-lama.pt' 'https://github.com/Sanster/models/releases/download/add_big_lama/big-lama.pt'. Pipeline сам ставит TORCH_HOME=C:\iopaint-cache\torch. Подробности — skills/image-text-replace/README.md.

python_user_packages.name: easyocr
python_user_packages.purpose: OCR engine для skills/image-text-replace (RU+EN). Заменил paddleocr т.к. paddleocr 3.x качает модели с baidu CDN который недоступен с корп-сети. EasyOCR качает с GitHub Releases.
python_user_packages.post_install_note: First use of easyocr.Reader(['ru','en']) скачивает ~64MB detection + 50MB recognition модели в %USERPROFILE%/.EasyOCR/model/. Source — GitHub Releases (стабильно).

python_user_packages.name: diffusers
python_user_packages.purpose: SD pipeline для skills/image-text-replace v3.0 финального scan-ification pass. Включает: StableDiffusionInpaintPipeline для low-strength img2img на text region
python_user_packages.post_install_note: REQUIRED: установить также transformers + accelerate + safetensors. SD model (runwayml/stable-diffusion-inpainting ~3.4GB UNet + 2GB other) скачивается на первом использовании в ASCII-safe path C:/sd-cache. Требует HF account + read token (https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens). См. skills/image-text-replace/SKILL.md секцию 'SD setup'.

python_user_packages.name: transformers
python_user_packages.purpose: SD pipeline dependency (text encoder, tokenizer for image-text-replace v3.0)

python_user_packages.name: safetensors
python_user_packages.purpose: SD model weights format (safer than .ckpt pickle)

mcp_servers.name: document-loader
mcp_servers.purpose: Office docs + PNG-rendering of slides (AWS Labs)

mcp_servers.name: autocad-mcp
mcp_servers.purpose: AutoCAD integration (LT + headless ezdxf), 8 tools after restart
mcp_servers.post_install_note: If AutoCAD installed: in AutoCAD run APPLOAD and load '{install_dir}\lisp-code\mcp_dispatch.lsp'. Then restart Claude Code to see 8 new tools.

mcp_servers.name: adeu
mcp_servers.purpose: docx-diff с нативными Word Track Changes для diff между ревизиями. Полезно для согласования правок в коммерческих документах.
mcp_servers.post_install_note: Прогрев первый раз: uvx --from adeu adeu-server --help (затем restart Claude session).
